title: Onboarding - Eula page - Continue
scenario: EULA Continue button remains disabled until agreement checkbox is checked during first-time onboarding flow
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Observe the 'Well hello, first things first...' onboarding screen.
3. Verify the EULA page displays the text asking the user to agree to the Poly User License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
4. Verify that clickable links to both the Poly User License Agreement and Privacy Policy documents are present.
5. Observe the Continue button — verify it is initially blurred/greyed out.
6. Tap the Continue button without checking the agreement checkbox.
7. Verify that tapping Continue does nothing (no navigation occurs).
8. Tap the agreement checkbox to accept the terms.
10. Observe the next screen — verify it navigates to the 'Up-to-Date' page showing update-related messaging and a Skip button.
expected: After checking the agreement checkbox and tapping Continue, the user should navigate to the 'Up-to-Date' page which displays update-related messaging and a Skip button.
